search:RabbitMQ and Kafka Performance Tu.content:
- **Redpanda**: 
  - CLI command: `redpanda start`
  - Latest version: Check [official website](https://vectorized.io)
  - Key config options: `--memory`, `--cpus`

- **Kafka**:
  - CLI command: `kafka-server-start.sh <config-file>`
  - Latest version: Check [Apache Kafka releases](https://kafka.apache.org/downloads)
  - Key config options: `num.partitions`, `replication.factor`

- **GitHub Repository for Comparison**:
  - URL: [tsk902000/kafka-performance-comparison](https://github.com/tsk902000/kafka-performance-comparison)

- **Benchmarking with Aiven**:
  - Service: Kafka on UpCloud
  - Metrics: Write Throughput

- **Kafka vs RabbitMQ Comparison**:
  - Performance metrics: Throughput and Latency
